understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, staying within the 2-attempts-per-level and 50-turns-per-attempt limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) or a CLICK. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically pulls the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile, hits a hazard, or reaches the goal. CLICK targets a specific coordinate and is used to remove clickable/breakable blocks (e.g., `x`) to open fall paths; clicks do not move the player directly. Landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`) ends the attempt immediately. UNDO reverts the previous action. Planning relies on the state’s landing previews (left_landing/right_landing) and corridor_scan to identify safe landings and passage columns that drop to a new y-level, prioritizing moves that create progress toward the goal.
